material_findings: onyx is a 942153 KB public repository and is the largest repository seen in this batch; upstream provenance, licenses, vendored assets, models, datasets and deployment content must be established before reuse.
Testauth20211014 is a 189875 KB private authentication repository and requires deep secret, identity-data, signing-key, binary and deployment review.
SkoolaNETibra is a 254091 KB private education repository and materially expands the Skoola family; it must be preserved and compared with Skoola_NET20241122 and Appskoola-net.
SASERP811V37-withcodeontime, YouthApps20230430 and CPDEventManagerCOT202211-07 report size 0; no empty/disposable inference is permitted before branch and history inventory.
The CPD/Event and BlazorShop families expanded again, increasing false-canonical risk from filename chronology alone.
